prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-LEATHERPUNCHSET-12PC Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Heavy-Duty 12-Piece Hollow Punch Set with Zipper Pouch Description: Punch holes in leather or plastic easily with the Universal Tool Hollow Punch Set.

This set comes with 12 individual punch sizes that are all feature a machine diamond-patterned grip for a secure, no-slip hold. The sizes included are: 1/8", 5/32", 3/16", 7/32", 1/4", 5/16", 3/8", 7/16", 1/2", 9/32", 5/8" and 3/4".

All of the punches are constructed of heat-hardened high carbon steel for long lasting durability and sharpness. They come with a durable canvas zip up pouch for easy storage and transportation when not in use. Make sure to grab a set of these punches before your next leather-working project. Search Terms: crafting DIY leather working hole punches carbon steel punches Features: - 12 Piece Hollow Punch Set: 1/8", 5/32", 3/16", 7/32", 1/4", 5/16", 3/8", 7/16", 1/2", 9/32", 5/8", 3/4" - Constructed of Heat-hardened High Carbon Steel for Sharpness and Durability - Machined Diamond-patterned Grip for Secure, No Slip Hold under Hammer - Punch Precise Holes in Leather or Plastic - Comes with Durable Canvas Zip Pouch for Easy Storage & Transportation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 12-pk Hollow Punch Set with Zipper Pouch

openai.title_differentiation: Heat Hardened High Carbon Steel, Diamond Patterned Grip, 12 Sizes, Leather And Plastic, Canvas Zip Pouch
